Name: deactivateDepartment
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "deactivateDepartment" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."deactivate_department"("p_department_id" := $1, "session" := $2) AS "_fn_deactivate_department" WHERE "_fn_deactivate_department"."role" = $3::text AND "_fn_deactivate_department"."department_id" = ANY($4::uuid[])) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.user"."user" AS "user", "_root.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "_root.base"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.user.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "user" FROM "_root.r.user.base") AS "_root.r.user" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "_root.base"."department_id" = "id" AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($5::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.department.base") AS "_root.r.department" ON ('true')) AS "_root"
